name: guesswhatisnext
description: A browser-based puzzle game where you're shown a sequence of items — emoji, text, or images — that follow a pattern, and you must guess what comes next!

scripts.test:load:all: npx artillery run tests/load/api-stress.yml && npx artillery run tests/load/websocket-stress.yml
scripts.docker:mssql:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.mssql.yml logs app --no-log-prefix -f | npx pino-pretty
scripts.dev:mssql: node scripts/check-compose-v2.js && docker compose -f docker-compose.mssql.yml up -d --build
scripts.test:e2e:mssql: echo "[CS25-1a] MSSQL E2E not yet implemented. Manual steps: npm run dev:mssql && bash scripts/wait-for-healthy.sh https://localhost:$HTTPS_PORT && BASE_URL=https://localhost:$HTTPS_PORT npx playwright test && npm run dev:mssql:down" && exit 1
